гҖҖгҖҖThirty years after the infamous 'Death Farm' murders in rural Pennsylvania, serial killing is in season once more. A young woman and her friends descend upon the farm to party after discovering that she has inherited the land. But soon after, the strange occurrences and brutal murders begin again. The shocking sequel to the 1987 SOV cult classic SPLATTER FARM.
